interaction_phrase: narrow the gap with other advanced countries
occurrence_sentence: Korea has also recently designated quantum science and technology as one of the 12 National Strategic Technologies and included it in the New Growth 4.0 Strategy's 15 Projects and makes efforts to narrow the gap with other advanced countries through workforce development and aggressive funding expansion.

interaction_phrase: narrow the gap with other advanced countries
occurrence_sentence: Korea has also recently designated quantum science and technology as one of the 12 National Strategic Technologies and included it in the New Growth 4.0 Strategy's 15 Projects and makes efforts to narrow the gap with other advanced countries through workforce development and aggressive funding expansion.

interaction_phrase: Major powerhouses such as the United States
occurrence_sentence: Major powerhouses such as the United States, Europe, Japan, and China have long recognized the universality and disruptive potential of quantum science and technology and have established comprehensive national development strategies to make substantial funding in large-scale research and development efforts.

interaction_phrase: Major powerhouses such as Europe
occurrence_sentence: Major powerhouses such as the United States, Europe, Japan, and China have long recognized the universality and disruptive potential of quantum science and technology and have established comprehensive national development strategies to make substantial funding in large-scale research and development efforts.

interaction_phrase: Source: Korean Intellectual Property Office (2021)
occurrence_sentence: * Source: Korean Intellectual Property Office (2021)

interaction_phrase: designated as Korea-Quantum Industry Center
occurrence_sentence: Jan. 2022 NIA designated as Korea-Quantum Industry Center

interaction_phrase: registered with the Future Quantum Convergence Forum
occurrence_sentence: The number of Korean quantum science and technology supply companies, quantum SMEs, and quantum product/service companies registered with the Future Quantum Convergence Forum and Alliance of Leading Quantum Computing Companies

interaction_phrase: will designate quantum academic and research institutions in universities and research centers
occurrence_sentence: The Korean government will expand quantum graduate schools to integrate quantum science and technology theory, practice, and projects in master's and doctoral programs, and designate quantum academic and research institutions in universities and research centers to cultivate key quantum workforce by providing overseas assignments and training opportunities.

interaction_phrase: will support quantum academic programs and quantum convergence projects
occurrence_sentence: Furthermore, Korea will support quantum academic programs and quantum convergence projects targeting such departments as electrical and electronic engineering, computer science, and information communication to provide diverse career paths for quantum engineers.

interaction_phrase: will designate relevant universities and government-funded research institutes as quantum research hubs
occurrence_sentence: Korea will designate relevant universities and government-funded research institutes as quantum research hubs and initiate large-scale government quantum research and development projects to stimulate job creation in the public sector.

interaction_phrase: Korea's technology level is at approximately 62.5% compared to the leading country, the United States
occurrence_sentence: Currently, Korea's technology level is at approximately 62.5% compared to the leading country, the United States, and it is imperative for us to strengthen our own quantum capabilities.

interaction_phrase: Korea's technology level
occurrence_sentence: Currently, Korea's technology level is at approximately 62.5% compared to the leading country, the United States, and it is imperative for us to strengthen our own quantum capabilities.

interaction_phrase: Korea plans to launch a Quantum Science and Technology Flagship Project
occurrence_sentence: building upon this, Korea plans to launch a Quantum Science and Technology Flagship Project with clear technology objectives by 2031(mission-oriented).

interaction_phrase: along with the Korean Positioning System (KPS)
occurrence_sentence: Korea aims to secure world's top-class quantum sensor technology, focusing on GPS-independent navigation technology applicable in national defense and public sectors, along with the Korean Positioning System (KPS).

interaction_phrase: the development of ultra-precise atomic clocks to be mounted on the Korean Positioning System (KPS)
occurrence_sentence: In addition, the development of ultra-precise atomic clocks to be mounted on the Korean Positioning System (KPS), an independent satellite navigation system, will contribute to providing ultra-precise regional navigation in and around the Korean Peninsula.

interaction_phrase: collaboration between the government and the private sectors
occurrence_sentence: Moreover, collaboration between the government and the private sectors is essential to build a technological foundation that leverages Korea's strengths and enables us to become a leader in the global quantum foundry and materials, parts, and equipment markets in the medium to long term.

interaction_phrase: public-private collaboration model
occurrence_sentence: To leverage the capabilities of Korean semiconductor companies, a public-private collaboration model will be established for the operation of quantum fabs, and in the medium to long term, private-led quantum foundries will be proliferated, positioning Korea as a future global leader in quantum foundries.

interaction_phrase: the Korean government will play a role in providing support and facilitating the process
occurrence_sentence: Therefore, for the early establishment of the quantum industry ecosystem and the enhancement of international competitiveness, the Korean government will play a role in providing support and facilitating the process.

interaction_phrase: the Korean government supports quantum advantage exploration research
occurrence_sentence: Taking into account the uncertainty of the scale of the socio-economic value that can be obtained through the application of quantum science and technology, the Korean government supports quantum advantage exploration research that can confirm potential usefulness in industry, defense, and the public sector.

interaction_phrase: the Korean government supports quantum advantage exploration research
occurrence_sentence: Support the entry into the quantum industry through quantum advantage exploration and empirical research.

interaction_phrase: Korea's quantum industry ecosystem and startup investments are at an initial stage
occurrence_sentence: In contrast, Korea's quantum industry ecosystem and startup investments are at an initial stage.

interaction_phrase: Korea is actively involved
occurrence_sentence: Korea is actively involved in identifying promising startups in new industrial sectors based on quantum science and technology through the Outstanding Startup 1000+ Project and other technology-based venture support programs.

interaction_phrase: Korea is facilitating
occurrence_sentence: Korea is facilitating industry participation in the emerging field of quantum science and technology and creating institutional foundations to boost public-private joint projects.

interaction_phrase: designated quantum science and technology as a defense strategic technology and expands investment in quantum science and technology sectors to prepare for existing threats and future battlefields
occurrence_sentence: The Korean government, through the Defense Science and Technology Innovation Basic Plan, designated quantum science and technology as a defense strategic technology and expands investment in quantum science and technology sectors to prepare for existing threats and future battlefields.

interaction_phrase: expanded the security compliance verification system
occurrence_sentence: The Korean government has expanded the security compliance verification system, which was previously applied to conventional information protection and network equipment, to include quantum cryptography communication equipment for the first time in the world.

interaction_phrase: have already conducted technology competitions for standardizing post-quantum cryptography
occurrence_sentence: Leading countries such as the United States and the European Union have already conducted technology competitions for standardizing post-quantum cryptography (PQC) and have published transition scenarios.

interaction_phrase: strengthening international cooperation with governments and industry partners of major quantum countries worldwide, including the United States
occurrence_sentence: The Korean government is pursuing the strengthening of international cooperation with governments and industry partners of major quantum countries worldwide, including the United States and the EU, to enhance national competitiveness in quantum science and technology and create synergies between countries.

interaction_phrase: leading countries in quantum science and technology, such as ... the United Kingdom
occurrence_sentence: Leading countries in quantum science and technology, such as the United States, the United Kingdom, France, Germany, and Japan, have opened a webpage called "Entanglement Exchange" to share their investment and research status and introduce opportunities for workforce exchange.

interaction_phrase: leading countries in quantum science and technology, such as the United States
occurrence_sentence: Leading countries in quantum science and technology, such as the United States, the United Kingdom, France, Germany, and Japan, have opened a webpage called "Entanglement Exchange" to share their investment and research status and introduce opportunities for workforce exchange.

interaction_phrase: Korea will enhance mutual cooperation
occurrence_sentence: Korea will enhance mutual cooperation with countries around the world as the quantum industry takes its initial steps and actively encourages the participation of domestic industries.

interaction_phrase: the Korean industry can participate in international cooperation
occurrence_sentence: Efforts will be made to ensure that the Korean industry can participate in international cooperation and take a leadership role in quantum science and technology through various strategic projects.

interaction_phrase: Following the United States
occurrence_sentence: Following the United States, Korea is the second country that enacts a Quantum Act, known as the quantum science and technology development and industry promotion act.

interaction_phrase: the Korean government operates the Quantum Technology Special Committee
occurrence_sentence: The Korean government operates the Quantum Technology Special Committee as a comprehensive planning tower for quantum science and technology and plans to expand and strengthen the joint government-private committee to enhance policy coordination functions across ministries in the future.

interaction_phrase: is composed of
occurrence_sentence: Currently, the National Quantum Technology Special Committee (Chairman: Vice Minister for Science, Technology and Innovation, Ministry of Science and ICT) is composed of a total of 21 members, including private sector experts from industry, academia, research institutes, and representatives from six government ministries, under the National Science and Technology Advisory Council.

interaction_phrase: promoting the cultivation
occurrence_sentence: Korea is promoting the cultivation of research institutions in the field of quantum science and technology to secure independent quantum science and technology capabilities and to acquire the necessary technology at the international level.

interaction_phrase: will foster open research hubs
occurrence_sentence: The government will foster open research hubs that connect various research entities, such as universities, government-funded research institutes, and companies.

interaction_phrase: introduced the "National Strategy for Quantum Technology Research and Development"
occurrence_sentence: To enhance the strategic nature of these investments, the Korean government introduced the "National Strategy for Quantum Technology Research and Development" in 2021, followed by the "Quantum Science and Technology Roadmap" in the subsequent year.

interaction_phrase: the Korean government and the private sectors are jointly preparing
occurrence_sentence: In this atmosphere, the Korean government and the private sectors are jointly preparing for the development of quantum science and technology and the transition to a quantum economy by investing over 3 trillion KRW in the quantum science and technology field by 2035.

interaction_phrase: leading a quantum jump in Korea's quantum science and technology
occurrence_sentence: These efforts also involve driving mission-oriented research and development that brings together industry, academia, and research institutions as the focal point, with the aim of leading a quantum jump in Korea's quantum science and technology.
